'''ây-h-w''' ('''kayahaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unaddress|unaddress]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unaddress|unaddress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kayahaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyahaw|thiyahaw]] || [[word:jiyahaw|jiyahaw]] || [[word:shiyahaw|shiyahaw]] || [[word:kiyahaw|kiyahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyahaw|thuthuyahaw]] || [[word:jujuyahaw|jujuyahaw]] || [[word:shushuyahaw|shushuyahaw]] || [[word:kukuyahaw|kukuyahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyahaw|thuyahaw]] || [[word:juyahaw|juyahaw]] || [[word:shuyahaw|shuyahaw]] || [[word:kuyahaw|kuyahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyahaw|thuyahaw]] || [[word:juyahaw|juyahaw]] || [[word:shuyahaw|shuyahaw]] || [[word:kuyahaw|kuyahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyahaw|theyahaw]] || [[word:jeyahaw|jeyahaw]] || [[word:sheyahaw|sheyahaw]] || [[word:keyahaw|keyahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyahaw|thothoyahaw]] || [[word:jojoyahaw|jojoyahaw]] || [[word:shoshoyahaw|shoshoyahaw]] || [[word:kokoyahaw|kokoyahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyahaw|thoyahaw]] || [[word:joyahaw|joyahaw]] || [[word:shoyahaw|shoyahaw]] || [[word:koyahaw|koyahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyahaw|thoyahaw]] || [[word:joyahaw|joyahaw]] || [[word:shoyahaw|shoyahaw]] || [[word:koyahaw|koyahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyahaw|thĂŠyahaw]] || [[word:jĂŠyahaw|jĂŠyahaw]] || [[word:shĂŠyahaw|shĂŠyahaw]] || [[word:kĂŠyahaw|kĂŠyahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayahaw|thathayahaw]] || [[word:jajayahaw|jajayahaw]] || [[word:shashayahaw|shashayahaw]] || [[word:kakayahaw|kakayahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayahaw|thayahaw]] || [[word:jayahaw|jayahaw]] || [[word:shayahaw|shayahaw]] || [[word:kayahaw|kayahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayahaw|thayahaw]] || [[word:jayahaw|jayahaw]] || [[word:shayahaw|shayahaw]] || [[word:kayahaw|kayahaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayahaw|shayahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayahaw|goshayahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayahaw|gokishayahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayahawnĂŒ|shayahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayahawnknĂŒ|goshayahawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayahawnĂŒ|gokishayahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayahawshĂ«|shayahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayahawnkshĂ«|goshayahawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayahawshĂ«|gokishayahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayahawro|shayahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayahawnkro|goshayahawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayahawro|gokishayahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayahawmu|shayahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayahawnkmu|goshayahawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayahawmu|gokishayahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayahawsher|shayahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayahawnksher|goshayahawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayahawsher|gokishayahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayahawng|shayahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayahawnkng|goshayahawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayahawng|gokishayahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayahawya|shayahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayahawnkya|goshayahawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayahawya|gokishayahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayahawyam|shayahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayahawnkyam|goshayahawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayahawyam|gokishayahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayahawnĂŒshĂ«|shayahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayahawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayahawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayahawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayahawnĂŒro|shayahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayahawnknĂŒro|goshayahawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayahawnĂŒro|gokishayahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayahawnĂŒmu|shayahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayahawnknĂŒmu|goshayahawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayahawnĂŒmu|gokishayahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayahawshĂ«nĂŒ|shayahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayahawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayahawshĂ«ro|shayahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayahawnkshĂ«ro|goshayahawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayahawshĂ«ro|gokishayahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayahawshĂ«mu|shayahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayahawnkshĂ«mu|goshayahawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayahawshĂ«mu|gokishayahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayahawronĂŒ|shayahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayahawnkronĂŒ|goshayahawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayahawronĂŒ|gokishayahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayahawroshĂ«|shayahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayahawnkroshĂ«|goshayahawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayahawroshĂ«|gokishayahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayahawromu|shayahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayahawnkromu|goshayahawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayahawromu|gokishayahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayahawmunĂŒ|shayahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayahawnkmunĂŒ|goshayahawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayahawmunĂŒ|gokishayahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayahawmushĂ«|shayahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayahawnkmushĂ«|goshayahawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayahawmushĂ«|gokishayahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayahawmuro|shayahawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayahawnkmuro|goshayahawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayahawmuro|gokishayahawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
